script: echo '===== Rosi: full bug-class scan vs working sibling (Aixa) =====' && F=/home/azureuser/rosi-responder.py; APP=$(grep -oE '[0-9a-f-]{36}' $F | head -1); echo "  app_id: $APP"; echo; echo '----- bug 1: SP exists? -----'; az ad sp show --id $APP >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '  YES' || echo '  >>> MISSING'; echo; echo '----- bug 2: vault secret format -----'; SECRET=$(az keyvault secret show --vault-name SDN-YooVault --name rosi-bot-client-secret --query value -o tsv 2>/dev/null); echo "  raw length: ${#SECRET}"; CLEAN=$(printf '%s' "$SECRET" | tail -n 1); echo "  clean length: ${#CLEAN}"; if [ "${#SECRET}" != "${#CLEAN}" ]; then echo '  >>> SECRET HAS WARNING PREFIX'; fi; echo; echo '----- bug 3: Microsoft URL =====-----'; az resource show --resource-group SDNeurosurgery-OpenClaw --resource-type Microsoft.BotService/botServices --name OpenClaw-RosiClaude --query 'properties.endpoint' -o tsv 2>&1; echo; echo '----- bug 4: allow-list -----'; grep -E 'USER_AAD_ID|YOO_AAD_ID|aadObjectId.*USER_AAD_ID|aadObjectId.*not in' $F | head -4; echo; echo '----- bug 5: duplicate _post_reply_orig_protect? -----'; echo "  count: $(grep -c '^def _post_reply_orig_protect' $F)"; echo; echo '----- nginx route present? -----'; grep -A 1 'location /rosi/' /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/mskai-bot 2>&1 | head -4; echo; echo '----- service state -----'; systemctl is-active rosi-bot.service rosi-responder.service; echo "  uptime: $(systemctl show rosi-responder.service -p ActiveEnterTimestamp --value)"; echo "  inbound: $(wc -l < /home/azureuser/.rosi-bot/activities.jsonl 2>/dev/null)"; echo "  outbound: $(wc -l < /home/azureuser/.rosi-bot/outbound.jsonl 2>/dev/null)"
